name: The Verdant Wreck
description: A massive biodome fragment — the growing section of a colony ship, its transparent dome panels fogged with condensation. When the ship broke apart, the growth systems kept running. Now it drifts in the void as a small jungle of dense green canopy and humid air, warm light leaking from every seam and crack in the hull.

rooms.name: Overgrown Airlock
rooms.description: Thick brown roots crack through grey hull plates, splitting seams that were never meant to open. Warm, humid air rushes outward carrying the smell of wet soil and chlorophyll. The airlock frame is half-buried in bright green moss, and condensation beads on every metal surface. The light inside is diffuse and warm, filtered through vegetation.

rooms.name: The Promenade
rooms.description: A wide corridor with a vaulted ceiling, its white tile walls now draped in creeping vines. Faded directional signs in yellow and blue point north to GREENHOUSE and west to AQUAPONICS. The floor tiles have buckled under root pressure, and bioluminescent fungus fills the cracks with thin lines of pale blue-green light, branching like veins across the floor.
aspects: Echoes of a Crew Long Gone

rooms.name: Aquaponics Tanks
rooms.description: Rows of chest-high glass tanks line both walls, most cracked and clouded. Murky green water circulates through corroded pipe connections, driven by some ancient pump that still thumps rhythmically beneath the floor. Pale bioluminescent eels flicker between the intact tanks. Where water drips onto the deck, clusters of white and amber mushrooms sprout from the rust.

rooms.name: The Nursery
rooms.description: Shattered seed trays of brown plastic cover every surface — the floor, the counters, stacked against the walls. Seedlings that were never meant to grow this large have pressed dark-leafed canopies against the ceiling, cracking white panels overhead to expose ductwork and wiring. Thick golden pollen drifts in the warm air like slow snow. A metal workbench near the door is buried under loose papers.

rooms.name: The Greenhouse
rooms.description: The main growing dome, perhaps forty paces across. Transparent panels overhead reveal raw void — black sky and scattered stars behind rivulets of condensation. Below, a riot of green in every shade, from pale lime to deep forest. Chest-high planter beds overflow with vegetation, and narrow paths of swept tile wind between them, recently cleared.

rooms.name: The Canopy
rooms.description: Trees have grown tall enough to press against the dome panels, their dark trunks thick and closely spaced. Vines hang between them like heavy curtains, swaying slightly in air currents from the ventilation system. The light is dim and green-filtered, everything in deep shadow below the canopy. Occasional rustling sounds come from overhead.

rooms.name: Root Wall
rooms.description: The corridor terminates in a wall of interwoven roots, each as thick as a person's torso, bark slick with moisture and dark with age. They pulse with slow green bioluminescence, and through the gaps between them, a deeper, warmer light glows gold. The roots are packed too tightly to squeeze through. The air smells of wet wood and ozone.

features.name: Roots
features.description: Massive interwoven roots, each thicker than your arm, pulsing with slow green bioluminescence. The bark is tough and slick with moisture — too damp to burn. You'd need to coat them with something flammable first.

north.locked_desc: Massive roots block the passage north. They're alive and pulsing with green energy — too thick and damp to cut, too dense to squeeze through.

rooms.name: Observation Platform
rooms.description: A narrow metal platform jutting above the tree canopy, reached by a rusted ladder bolted to the wall. Up here, the dome panels are cracked and missing in places, and the void stretches in every direction — the skerry a faint warm speck of light. Below, the dark green canopy spreads wall to wall, and through it you can trace the root system converging northward like the veins of a leaf.

rooms.name: Growth Control Room
rooms.description: A cramped utility room behind a heavy maintenance hatch, barely large enough for two people. Dead consoles of grey metal and dark glass line three walls. One panel still flickers — its green-on-black screen displaying a schematic of the biodome's root network, most nodes pulsing red. Cables snake across the floor in thick bundles.

features.name: Growth Controller Console
features.description: A flickering console showing a schematic of the biodome's root network. Most nodes pulse red — overgrown, unresponsive. The panel below is dented but not sealed. With the right tools, you could get inside and repair the circuits.

rooms.name: The Verdant Heart
rooms.description: A domed chamber at the biodome's core, every surface threaded with roots. An enormous plant fills the space, crystallized mid-bloom — its petals frozen in a tight spiral of translucent green and gold, refracting light in all directions. The roots radiate outward through the walls and floor like spokes of a wheel. At the base of the crystallized flower, a single living bud the size of a fist pulses with warm amber light.

features.name: Crystallized Bloom
features.description: An enormous flower frozen mid-bloom, petals spiraling outward in crystallized green and gold. It hums faintly. At its base, a single living bud pulses with concentrated energy — small enough to carry, if you could detach it.

enemies_data.name: Tangle-Vine
enemies_data.description: Thick tendrils lash out from the canopy above — a plant that's learned to hunt.
